auth.label: API Key
auth.description: GoSquared API key passed as the api_key query parameter. Create or manage API keys in API Access settings: https://www.gosquared.com/settings/api.

extraFields.label: Site Token
extraFields.description: GoSquared site_token for the default project. Find it in Settings > Current Project > General: https://www.gosquared.com/setup/general.

actions.name: get_now_overview
actions.description: Retrieve a realtime GoSquared Now overview for the configured project.

siteToken.description: GoSquared site_token for the project to query. Omit this to use the siteToken saved on the connection.

from.description: The start date-time for the GoSquared query.

to.description: The end date-time for the GoSquared query.

dateFormat.description: Moment.js date format that GoSquared should use for returned date parameters.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a GoSquared Now overview.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by GoSquared.

actions.name: get_now_time_series
actions.description: Retrieve GoSquared Now visitor counts over time for the configured project.

siteToken.description: GoSquared site_token for the project to query. Omit this to use the siteToken saved on the connection.

from.description: The start date-time for the GoSquared query.

to.description: The end date-time for the GoSquared query.

interval.description: Discrete time interval between Now Time Series points, such as 5min.

dateFormat.description: Moment.js date format that GoSquared should use for returned date parameters.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a GoSquared Now time series.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by GoSquared.

actions.name: get_token_info
actions.description: Fetch scope and authorization information for the connected GoSquared API key.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require input fields.

scopes.description: Scopes returned by GoSquared for the API key.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by GoSquared.

actions.name: get_trends_aggregate
actions.description: Retrieve GoSquared Trends aggregate metrics for a project over a time period.

siteToken.description: GoSquared site_token for the project to query. Omit this to use the siteToken saved on the connection.

from.description: The start date-time for the GoSquared query.

to.description: The end date-time for the GoSquared query.

dateFormat.description: Moment.js date format that GoSquared should use for returned date parameters.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return, either as a count such as 10 or offset,count such as 5,10.

interval.description: Interval used to split GoSquared Trends Aggregate datapoints.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving GoSquared Trends aggregate data.

raw.description: The raw JSON object returned by GoSquared.
